title: Hot Garlic Chicken

ingredients.title: For Chicken
items: 500 g boneless chicken breast or thigh, cut into bite-sized cubes

ingredients.title: For Sauce
items: 3 tbsp oil (neutral oil like peanut or canola)

instruction.title: Marinate Chicken
steps: Mix chicken with soy sauce, Shaoxing wine, ginger-garlic paste, white pepper, and cornstarch.

instruction.title: Cook Chicken
steps: Heat oil in a wok until hot.
Sear chicken until golden and 80% cooked.

instruction.title: Make Sauce
steps: Add oil, fry garlic until fragrant.
Add chilies, ginger, onion, bell pepper and stir-fry briefly.
Add sauces, chili paste, ketchup, vinegar, and sugar.
Pour in chicken stock and simmer.

instruction.title: Finish Dish
steps: Return chicken to wok and mix well.
Add cornstarch slurry and cook until sauce thickens and becomes glossy.
Adjust salt and add sesame oil.

instruction.title: Serve
steps: Garnish with spring onions and sesame seeds.
Serve hot with rice or noodles.

chefTips: Use high heat for authentic wok flavor.
Balance sweet, spicy, and savory flavors carefully.
